title: Contracts let by board
doc_html:
§3087.42.  Contracts let by board

Any and all contracts of the district shall be let by the board of commissioners under the provisions of the Public Bid Law, R.S. 38:2181 et seq.

Acts 1995, No. 443, §1, eff. June 17, 1995.
